query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mensagens_motivacionais (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  numero INT NOT NULL,
  autor VARCHAR(255),
  conteudo TEXT NOT NULL,
  ativo BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_mm_numero (numero)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS motivacional_do_dia_usuario (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  dataDia DATE NOT NULL,
  mensagemId INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_motivacional_usuario_dia (userId, dataDia)
);
